questions: Did the conflict resolution preserve all library CLI commands?

TypeScript typecheck passed with zero errors

answers.answer: Yes. Import at line 14, help text at lines 54-57, case handler at lines 98-102 all confirmed.

statement: CLI review confirmed all library commands intact after staging merge. No code changes required.
